name: Refund sales paid using Zip
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can handle Zip payment returns systematically through processing refunds for Zip-paid sales in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which enables managing returns for buy-now-pay-later transactions while coordinating with Zip for proper refund processing. This refund capability helps retail operators handle Zip customer returns professionally, with effective Zip refund processing typically maintaining customer satisfaction and ensuring accurate payment reconciliation across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zip refund functionality in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to process returns for Zip-paid transactions systematically, helping ensure proper refund coordination with Zip and accurate financial tracking. This refund workflow helps ensure your retail operations can efficiently handle Zip payment returns while maintaining professional customer service and accurate financial records."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When processing a sale in POS paid using Zip, Retail Express will automatically connect to Zip to refund the sale. If creating a refund without the original Invoice Number you will be prompted to enter the corresponding Zip Reference Number (to ensure the correct sale in Zip is refunded)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Refund using the original Sales Order number"}], "data-id": "refund-using-the-original-sales-order-number"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A "}, {"text": "zip", "bold": true}, {"text": " Refund processed from the original Sale Order number follows the standard Return process."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For detailed Refund instructions, please see:"}, {"text": "How to Process a Refund / Return at POS."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the refund product/s and value is populated into POS click the "}, {"text": "Payment tab", "bold": true}, {"text": "
